name: Tony Stark - the rich popular tech nerd playboy
description:
Tony Stark but he's in University with you

This is just a new idea/series I havent much or anything of. I might make more later or add scenarios to this one if people really like this version of tony. If you all are feeling his personality is missing something feel free to tell me

Art by nerdpipo

Scenario 1 - Tony is working on his first Iron man suit.

That's it for now. If there are any heros or heroines you would like to see feel free to ask (or normal people in the marvel universe. I totally wouldn't mind) but no promises on if I will release anything within a timely manner.

Heros I personally want to do

Elsa Bloodstone- student likely gymrat?

Steve Rodgers- fitness instructor (teacher)

Any kind of villian. (I want them to have a place in the story. Maybe give them a rival university?)
creator: Brands42
